content.query:
CREATE VIEW     BI_CustomerMaster
-- drop view BI_CustomerMaster
as
SELECT          DISTINCT A.[Customer Number]
,               COALESCE(B.[Customer Name], C.[Customer Name]) AS [Customer Name]
,               COALESCE(B.[Aligned Customer Number], C.[Aligned Customer Number]) AS [Aligned Customer Number]
,               COALESCE(B.[Aligned Customer Name], C.[Aligned Customer Name]) AS [Aligned Customer Name]
,               COALESCE(B.[Customer Group], C.[Customer Group]) AS [Customer Group]
,               COALESCE(B.[Country], C.[Country]) AS [Country]
,               COALESCE(B.[Customer Channel], C.[Customer Channel]) AS [Customer Channel]
,               COALESCE(B.[Customer Type], C.[Customer Type]) AS [Customer Type]
,               COALESCE(B.[Order Type], C.[Order Type]) AS [Order Type]
,               COALESCE(B.[Account Manager], C.[Account Manager]) AS [Account Manager]
,               COALESCE(B.[Sales Rep], C.[Sales Rep]) AS [Sales Rep]
,               COALESCE(B.[Budget Group], C.[Budget Group]) AS [Budget Group]

FROM
(
SELECT          DISTINCT *
FROM
(
    SELECT          distinct CUNO as [Customer Number]
    FROM            M3.OCUSMA
    
    UNION ALL

    SELECT          DISTINCT Customer_Number as [Customer Number]
    FROM            M3.CustomerMaster
) Z
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,               OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A230 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A230 END AS [Aligned Customer Number]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A030 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A030 END AS [Aligned Customer Name]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A430 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A430 END AS [Customer Group]
,               OC.CSCD AS [Country]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A530 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A530 END AS [Customer Channel]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A630 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A630 END AS [Customer Type]
,               NULL AS [Order Type]
,               CS.TX40 AS [Account Manager]
,               CS2.TX40 AS [Sales Rep]
,               CASE WHEN CG.A730 = '' THEN NULL ELSE CG.A730 END AS [Budget Group]
FROM            M3.OCUSMA OC
LEFT JOIN       M3.CUGEX1 CG ON OC.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSMA' AND A330 = ''
LEFT JOIN       M3.CMNUSR CS ON OC.RESP = CS.USID
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON OC.SMCD = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'SMCD'
) B on          A.[Customer Number] = B.[Customer Number]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          Customer_Number AS [Customer Number]
,               Customer_Name AS [Customer Name]
,               Aligned_Customer_Number AS [Aligned Customer Number]
,               Aligned_Customer_Name AS [Aligned Customer Name]
,               Customer_Group AS [Customer Group]
,               Country AS [Country]
,               Customer_Channel AS [Customer Channel]
,               Customer_Type AS [Customer Type]
,               Order_Type AS [Order Type]
,               Account_Manager AS [Account Manager]
,               Sales_Rep AS [Sales Rep]
,               Budget_Forecast_Group AS [Budget Group]
FROM            M3.CustomerMaster
) C on          A.[Customer Number] = C.[Customer Number]
